info.title: CivicRecords AI
info.description: AI-powered open records support for American cities

LOGIN_BAD_CREDENTIALS.summary: Bad credentials or the user is inactive.

UPDATE_USER_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS.summary: A user with this email already exists.
A user with this email already exists.

schema.title: Response List Audit Logs Audit Logs Get
Response List Service Accounts Service Accounts  Get
Response List Users Admin Users Get

post.description: Create a new user. Admin only.

patch.description:
Update user fields. Admin only.

Guards against self-demotion: admins cannot change their own role.

schema.title: Response List Model Registry Admin Models Registry Get

get.description: List all fee schedules. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List Fee Schedules Admin Fee Schedules Get

post.description: Create a new fee schedule. Admin only.

patch.description: Update a fee schedule. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete a fee schedule. Admin only.

get.description:
Identify coverage gaps across jurisdictions, departments, and exemption categories.

Returns:
- Jurisdictions (state codes) that have no exemption rules
- Departments with no assigned staff users
- Exemption categories without any active rules

post.description: Re-ingest a failed document. Resets status to pending and queues for processing.

Test connectivity to a data source without persisting anything.

This endpoint validates the connection parameters and attempts a test
connection. Credentials are NOT persisted, NOT logged, and NOT returned.

schema.title: Response List Chunks Documents  Document Id  Chunks Get
Response List Sync Failures Datasources  Source Id  Sync Failures Get
Response Get Sync Run Log Datasources  Source Id  Sync Run Log Get

post.description: Execute a hybrid search query. Optionally synthesize an LLM answer.

get.description: List the current user's search sessions.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Search Sessions Get

get.description: Get a search session with its query history.
Get available filter values for search.
Export search results as CSV. Runs a search and streams the results.

schema.title: Response List Attached Documents Requests  Request Id  Documents Get
Response Get Timeline Requests  Request Id  Timeline Get
Response Get Messages Requests  Request Id  Messages Get
Response Get Fees Requests  Request Id  Fees Get

post.description:
Estimate fees based on staff-entered page count and fee schedule.

Page count is a manual staff estimate — not inferred from ingested docs.
Request a fee waiver for this records request.

patch.description: Approve or deny a fee waiver. Reviewer/Admin only.

post.description:
Generate a draft response letter for a records request.

Attempts LLM generation via Ollama first; falls back to a structured
template if the LLM is unavailable.

get.description: Get the latest response letter for a request.

patch.description:
Update a response letter's edited content or status.

Status changes to 'approved' require REVIEWER role.

schema.title: Response List Rules Exemptions Rules  Get

get.description: Get audit history for an exemption rule.

post.description:
Test a rule against sample text. Returns match results.

Uses the `regex` library with timeout=2s to prevent ReDoS on
admin-entered patterns.
Scan all documents attached to a request for exemptions.

schema.title: Response List Flags Exemptions Flags  Request Id  Get

get.description: Acceptance/rejection rates by category, optionally filtered by department.

schema.title: Response Exemption Accuracy Exemptions Dashboard Accuracy Get

get.description: Export exemption flag data as JSON or CSV.

schema.title: Response List Templates Exemptions Templates  Get

get.description: Render a template with city profile variables substituted.

schema.title: Response Get City Profile City Profile Get

post.description:
Generate the next onboarding interview question.

Inspects the current city profile to determine which fields are still
empty, then generates a contextual question for the next incomplete field.
Does NOT update the profile — the frontend does that via PATCH /city-profile.

get.description: List all functional domains in the systems catalog.
List systems in the catalog, optionally filtered by domain.

post.description: Load or refresh the systems catalog from the bundled JSON.

schema.title: Response List Templates Notifications Templates Get

post.description: Create a new notification template (admin only).

schema.title: Response List Notification Log Notifications Log Get

DataSourceAdminRead.title: DataSourceAdminRead
DataSourceAdminRead.description: Full datasource shape including connection_config. Returned only by admin-gated endpoints.

DataSourceRead.title: DataSourceRead
DataSourceRead.description: Redacted datasource shape — safe for non-admin roles. connection_config omitted.

ServiceAccountCreated.title: ServiceAccountCreated
ServiceAccountCreated.description: Returned only on creation — includes the plaintext API key (shown once).

TestConnectionRequest.title: TestConnectionRequest
TestConnectionRequest.description:
Dedicated schema for test-connection. NOT the create schema.

Security: credentials in this request body are never persisted, never
written to audit logs, and never returned in the response.

UserSelfUpdate.title: UserSelfUpdate
UserSelfUpdate.description:
Schema for user self-update via PATCH /users/me.

Excludes role and department_id. Any payload containing those fields is
rejected at parse time (HTTP 422). Role and department changes require
admin privileges via /admin/users/{id}.
